subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the divine bestowal, and acknowledged the celestial Word, and been awakened by the breath of God, and received eternal life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من فاز بموهبة الهیه و اقر بالکلمة الربانیه و استقیظ بنسمة الله و استفاض حیاتاً ابدیه من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @chastisement and requital, @predictions and prophecies, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
